name: Lois' Upside Down Applepie W/Pecans
recipeIngredient: 2 Pie crusts, may be frozen as needed
1 Apple pie; recipe of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare your 9-inch (or larger) pie dish and preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Butter the pie dish completely, ensuring all sides are coated with the butter.
3. Place pecans evenly in the bottom of the pie dish and sprinkle with brown sugar.
4. Cover the pecans and sugar with your apple pie filling, spreading it evenly.
5. Top the apples with the remaining pie crust, sealing and crimping the edges as usual.
6. Bake for exactly 50 minutes at 400°F until golden brown.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes on a rack before carefully inverting onto a serving dish.
8. Serve immediately to prevent the butter and sugar from hardening.
